Personal Stories

Welcome to Aperture Log: The Beginning of My Photography Journey

Niraj Acharjya
Jul 20, 20264 min read

The kind of everyday moment that started this whole project.

On this page
  • Why I Started Aperture Log
  • Photography Without Fancy Gear
  • A Project to Learn and Grow
  • What to Expect Here

Photography has always been something I enjoyed, even before I thought about creating a website. Whenever I travel, walk around my university, or simply notice an interesting sky, I find myself reaching for my phone to capture the moment. Over time, those photos became more than just images stored in my gallery — they became memories that I wanted to keep and share.

That is the reason I created Aperture Log.

Why I Started Aperture Log

Aperture Log is my personal space on the internet where I can share photographs, stories, and experiences from different places and moments in life. Instead of posting everything on social media, I wanted a place where each photo could have its own story — and where I could continue improving both my photography and my web development skills.

Photography Without Fancy Gear

I am not a professional photographer, and I don't use expensive camera equipment. Most of the photographs you'll see here are taken with my smartphone. I believe that good photography is not only about the camera you own but also about observing the world around you. A beautiful sunset, a quiet road after the rain, or the light passing through the trees can create memorable photographs if you take the time to notice them.

A Project to Learn and Grow

This website is also a personal project that I built while learning web development. As I continue learning new technologies, I plan to improve the website by adding new features, better galleries, user interaction, and more ways to explore photographs. Every update is part of my journey as both a developer and a photography enthusiast.

What to Expect Here

In the coming weeks and months, I'll be sharing a variety of content, including:

  • Landscape and nature photography
  • Travel experiences
  • Mobile photography tips
  • Behind-the-scenes stories of my favorite photos
  • Website development updates
  • Personal photography projects

I hope this website becomes a place where I can document my progress over the years. Whether you're interested in photography, technology, or simply enjoy looking at beautiful moments captured through a camera, I hope you'll find something here that you enjoy.

Thank you for visiting Aperture Log and being part of the beginning of this journey. This is only the first chapter, and I'm excited to see where it leads.

See you in the next post.

#photography #smartphonephotography #webdevelopment #firstpost
